channel.title: Anthropic News
channel.description: Latest news and announcements from Anthropic

item.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
item.description: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats

item.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
item.description: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network

item.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
item.description: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on

item.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries

item.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
item.description: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record

item.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5

item.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
item.description: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem

item.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

item.title: Introducing Claude Corps
item.description: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

item.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
item.description: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.

item.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

item.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
item.description: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI.
